name: Toshin Holdings Co.,Ltd
summary: Toshin Holdings Co.,Ltd. engages in the mobile communication related business in Japan. It is involved in the mobile shop operation and sales, agency sales, shop management consignment, and corporate sales businesses. The company also acquires, develops, manages, and rents condominiums and office buildings. In addition, it engages in the golf course management; selling drinking water; managing and renting conference rooms; selling OA equipment and air conditioners; and managing golfer's salon. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.
